_comment: Shippable Claude Code settings.json snippet for the supervisor PostToolUse audit-logging hook. Merge the PostToolUse entry into the project's .claude/settings.json (alongside any PreToolUse entry). The hook is inert unless SHANNON_SUPERVISOR_SCOPE is set; when active it appends one line per Bash/Edit/Write invocation to .claude/skills/shannon-supervisor/audit.log (operational telemetry; gitignore the audit log in projects that track .claude/skills/).
